policy.purpose: Record the sibling-repo revisions aligned with this JobPipe checkpoint without vendoring companion code.
rules: Keep companions in their own repos.
Record sibling commit SHAs here when a JobPipe checkpoint depends on them.
Checkpoint local-only sibling changes in the sibling repo itself instead of copying that code into JobPipe.
Do not push sibling-only local checkpoints upstream unless they are intentionally prepared for that repo.

companions.sync_role: Supabase canonical schema — jobs / triage_decisions / v_actionable_cases / candidate_profile / applications / cv_versions / cover_letters / edge functions
CrewAI authoring service on :8766 — receives case context from this hub, returns CV patches + cover letter via hub POSTs and RR MCP
Next.js operator cockpit on :3001 — consumes this hub via integration gateway; canonical-state migration tracked in docs/canonical-state-stitch-plan.md
Final CV editor/export surface. Reached via MCP from JobSane; never imported into JobPipe.

removed_companions: jobsync — integration surface removed 2026-05-13 in commit 28f3c41 (replaced by Supabase NAV intake via JobData edge function import-nav-jobs)
notes.principle: All durable state lives in Supabase (jobsane/JobData). JobPipe is the only service that touches Supabase directly. Every other companion uses this hub (workspace_server :8765) as its only connector. See JobDesk docs/canonical-state-stitch-plan.md for the architectural rationale.
